sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 19.69 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.19)

statement.latex: (P.\,Wesolek). The acronym tdlc stands for totally disconnected and locally compact, and tdlcsc for tdlc and second countable. Let$(G)$denote the intersection of all open normal subgroups of a topological group$G$. The class of elementary tdlcsc groups is defined as the smallest class$$of tdlcsc groups such that$$contains all second countable profinite groups and countable discrete groups;$$is clo...
